pairs.en: Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Q4 2023 Novo Nordisk earnings conference call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode. After the speakers' presentation, there will be a question-and-answer session.
pairs.zh:
大家好，感谢您保持在线。欢迎参加诺和诺德（Novo Nordisk）2023年第四季度财报电话会议。目前，所有参与者均处于仅收听模式。嘉宾发言结束后，将进入问答环节。

Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Q4 2023 Novo Nordisk earnings conference call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode. After the speakers' presentation, there will be a question-and-answer session.

pairs.en: [Operator instructions] Please be advised that today's conference is being recorded. I would now like to hand the conference over to your speaker today, Daniel Bohsen, CVP, investor relations. Please go ahead.
pairs.zh:

pairs.en: Daniel Bohsen--Head of Investor Relations
pairs.zh:
Daniel Bohsen——投资者关系主管  
Daniel Bohsen--Head of Investor Relations

pairs.en: Welcome to this Novo Nordisk earnings call for the full year of 2023 and the outlook for 2024. My name is Daniel Muusmann Bohsen, and I'm the head of investor relations at Novo Nordisk. With me today, I have CEO of Novo Nordisk, Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen; executive vice president and head of commercial strategy and corporate affairs, Camilla Sylvest; executive vice president and head of North America operations, Doug Langa; executive vice president and head of development, Martin Holst Lange; and finally, chief financial officer, Karsten Munk Knudsen. All speakers will be available for the Q&A session.
pairs.zh:
欢迎参加诺和诺德2023年全年及2024年展望财报电话会议。我是丹尼尔·穆斯曼·博森，诺和诺德投资者关系负责人。今天与我一同出席的有：诺和诺德首席执行官Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen；执行副总裁兼商业战略与公司事务负责人Camilla Sylvest；执行副总裁兼北美运营负责人Doug Langa；执行副总裁兼研发负责人Martin Holst Lange；以及首席财务官Karsten Munk Knudsen。所有发言人都将参与问答环节。

Welcome to this Novo Nordisk earnings call for the full year of 2023 and the outlook for 2024. My name is Daniel Muusmann Bohsen, and I'm the head of investor relations at Novo Nordisk. With me today, I have CEO of Novo Nordisk, Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen; executive vice president and head of commercial strategy and corporate affairs, Camilla Sylvest; executive vice president and head of North America operations, Doug Langa; executive vice president and head of development, Martin Holst Lange; and finally, chief financial officer, Karsten Munk Knudsen. All speakers will be available for the Q&A session.

pairs.en: Today's announcement and the slides for this call are available on our website, novonordisk.com. Please note that the call is being webcast live, and a recording will be made available on our website as well. The call is scheduled to last one hour. Please turn to the next slide.

These are subject to risks and uncertainty that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. For further information on the risk factors, please see the company announcement for the full year 2023 and the slides prepared for this presentation. With that, over to you, Lars, for an update on our strategic aspirations.

pairs.en: Lars Fruergaard Jorgensen--President and Chief Executive Officer

Thank you, Daniel. Please turn to the next slide. In 2023, we delivered double-digit sales and operating profit growth, and we continue to make progress on our strategic aspirations. I'll walk you through the performance highlights before handing over the word to my colleagues.
pairs.zh:
谢谢您，Daniel。请翻到下一页幻灯片。2023年，我们实现了两位数的销售收入和营业利润增长，并持续在战略目标上取得进展。我先带大家回顾业绩亮点，随后将发言权交给我的同事。

Thank you, Daniel. Please turn to the next slide. In 2023, we delivered double-digit sales and operating profit growth, and we continue to make progress on our strategic aspirations. I'll walk you through the performance highlights before handing over the word to my colleagues.

pairs.en: We continue making progress on purpose and sustainability. On carbon emissions -- our carbon emissions decreased by 34% compared to pre-pandemic levels in 2019. And in 2023, we reached more than 40 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments. To uphold our commitment to being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 41% compared to 39% at the end of '22.
pairs.zh:
我们继续在使命和可持续发展方面取得进展。在碳排放方面——我们的碳排放量较2019年疫情前水平下降了34%。2023年，我们的糖尿病和肥胖症治疗药物惠及超过4000万患者。为了践行成为可持续发展雇主的承诺，我们将女性高级领导岗位的比例从2022年底的39%提升至41%。

We continue making progress on purpose and sustainability. On carbon emissions -- our carbon emissions decreased by 34% compared to pre-pandemic levels in 2019. And in 2023, we reached more than 40 million patients with our diabetes and obesity treatments. To uphold our commitment to being a sustainable employer, we expanded the number of women in senior leadership positions to 41% compared to 39% at the end of '22.

pairs.en: In the past year, we have developed and expanded our pipeline across all our therapy areas. In diabetes and obesity, we have seen several exciting trial readouts, and we have advanced novel assets into phase 3. We have also expanded our footprint in cardiovascular disease and strengthened our late-stage pipeline in rare blood disorders. Martin will come back to this and our overall R&D milestones later.
pairs.zh:
在过去一年中，我们在所有治疗领域开发并扩展了产品管线。在糖尿病和肥胖症方面，我们看到了多项令人兴奋的试验结果，并将新型资产推进至三期临床阶段。我们还扩大了在心血管疾病领域的影响力，并加强了在罕见血液疾病方面的后期管线。Martin稍后会再谈及这一点以及我们整体的研发里程碑。

原文：
In the past year, we have developed and expanded our pipeline across all our therapy areas. In diabetes and obesity, we have seen several exciting trial readouts, and we have advanced novel assets into phase 3. We have also expanded our footprint in cardiovascular disease and strengthened our late-stage pipeline in rare blood disorders. Martin will come back to this and our overall R&D milestones later.

pairs.en: In 2023, we have achieved two major milestones within commercial execution. We have reached our obesity sales operation of more than 25 billion Danish kroner and our aspiration for diabetes, which was to achieve one-third of the global diabetes value market. Going forward, we continue to aim for treating more patients with our innovative treatments. Lastly, we're very pleased with a strong sales growth of 36% and operating profit growth of 44% in 2023, both measured at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
在2023年，我们在商业执行方面实现了两个重要里程碑。我们的肥胖症销售业务突破了250亿丹麦克朗，同时糖尿病业务也达到了目标，即占据全球糖尿病价值市场的三分之一。展望未来，我们继续致力于通过创新治疗方案治疗更多患者。最后，我们对2023年以固定汇率计算的强劲销售增长36%和营业利润增长44%感到非常满意。

In 2023, we have achieved two major milestones within commercial execution. We have reached our obesity sales operation of more than 25 billion Danish kroner and our aspiration for diabetes, which was to achieve one-third of the global diabetes value market. Going forward, we continue to aim for treating more patients with our innovative treatments. Lastly, we're very pleased with a strong sales growth of 36% and operating profit growth of 44% in 2023, both measured at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: Now, I would like to hand over the word to Camilla, who will give us the latest update on our commercial execution.
pairs.zh:
现在，我想把发言权交给Camilla，她将为我们带来最新的商业执行情况更新。

Now, I would like to hand over the word to Camilla, who will give us the latest update on our commercial execution.

pairs.en: Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Head of Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs
pairs.zh:
Camilla Sylvest——执行副总裁，商业战略与公司事务主管  
Camilla Sylvest--Executive Vice President, Head of Commercial Strategy and Corporate Affairs

pairs.en: Thank you, Lars, and please turn to the next slide. In 2023, our total sales increased by 36%. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 54% and international operations growing 16%. Our GLP-1 sales in diabetes increased 52%, driven by North America growing 52% and international operations growing 53%.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Lars，请翻到下一张幻灯片。2023年，我们的总销售额增长了36%。这一销售增长由两个业务部门共同推动，北美业务增长了54%，国际业务增长了16%。我们的糖尿病GLP-1销售额增长了52%，其中北美业务增长52%，国际业务增长53%。

Thank you, Lars, and please turn to the next slide. In 2023, our total sales increased by 36%. The sales growth was driven by both operating units with North America operations growing 54% and international operations growing 16%. Our GLP-1 sales in diabetes increased 52%, driven by North America growing 52% and international operations growing 53%.

pairs.en: Insulin sales decreased by 6%, driven by declining sales in the U.S. and region China. Obesity care sales grew 154%. And international operations, sales grew 47%, driven by both Saxenda and Wegovy.
pairs.zh:
胰岛素销售额下降了6%，主要由于美国和region China地区销售额下滑。肥胖症护理销售额增长了154%。国际业务销售额增长了47%，由Saxenda和Wegovy共同推动。

原文：Insulin sales decreased by 6%, driven by declining sales in the U.S. and region China. Obesity care sales grew 154%. And international operations, sales grew 47%, driven by both Saxenda and Wegovy.

pairs.en: Sales of Saxenda increased by 14% and sales of Wegovy reached around 2 billion Danish kroner. Going forward, we continue to roll out Wegovy in a sustainable manner by volume cap launches to balance supply and demand. In North America operations, obesity care sales grew 212%. Total rare disease sales decreased by 15%, which was driven by a 24% decrease in international operations and by a 1% decrease in North America operations, following a reduction in supply of Norditropin.
pairs.zh:
Saxenda的销售额增长了14%，Wegovy的销售额达到了约2 billion Danish kroner。未来，我们将继续以可持续的方式通过控制发售数量来推出Wegovy，以平衡供需。在北美业务中，肥胖护理销售额增长了212%。罕见病总销售额下降了15%，这是由于国际业务下降24%以及北美业务下降1%所致，原因在于Norditropin的供应减少。

Sales of Saxenda increased by 14% and sales of Wegovy reached around 2 billion Danish kroner. Going forward, we continue to roll out Wegovy in a sustainable manner by volume cap launches to balance supply and demand. In North America operations, obesity care sales grew 212%. Total rare disease sales decreased by 15%, which was driven by a 24% decrease in international operations and by a 1% decrease in North America operations, following a reduction in supply of Norditropin.

pairs.en: Please turn to the next slide. With 29% sales growth in diabetes care, we are growing faster than the total diabetes market. As a result, our global diabetes value market share increased to 33.8%, which is above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes value market. This increase reflects market share gains in both North America operations and international operations.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一张幻灯片。在diabetes care领域，我们实现了29%的销售增长，增速超过了整个糖尿病市场。因此，我们在全球糖尿病市场的价值份额提高到33.8%，超过了我们战略目标——即达到全球糖尿病价值市场的三分之一。这一增长反映了我们在North America operations和international operations中的市场份额提升。

Please turn to the next slide. With 29% sales growth in diabetes care, we are growing faster than the total diabetes market. As a result, our global diabetes value market share increased to 33.8%, which is above our strategic aspiration of reaching one-third of the global diabetes value market. This increase reflects market share gains in both North America operations and international operations.

pairs.en: Please turn to the next slide. In international operations, total diabetes cases increased by 20% in 2023, which was primarily driven by GLP-1 sales growing 53%. Novo Nordisk is the market leader in international operations with a GLP-1 value market share over 70%. Ozempic continues its GLP-1 market leadership with 47.5% market share.
pairs.zh:
请翻到下一页幻灯片。在国际业务中，2023年糖尿病总病例数增加了20%，主要得益于GLP-1销售额增长了53%。Novo Nordisk是国际业务的市场领导者，其GLP-1价值市场份额超过70%。Ozempic继续保持GLP-1市场领先地位，市场份额为47.5%。

Please turn to the next slide. In international operations, total diabetes cases increased by 20% in 2023, which was primarily driven by GLP-1 sales growing 53%. Novo Nordisk is the market leader in international operations with a GLP-1 value market share over 70%. Ozempic continues its GLP-1 market leadership with 47.5% market share.

pairs.en: Rybelsus has just shy of 14% value market share, driven by solid uptake across geographies. And with that, I will hand over the word to Doug.
pairs.zh:
Rybelsus在价值市场份额上略低于14%，得益于各地区强劲的采用率。接下来，我将把发言权交给Doug。

Rybelsus has just shy of 14% value market share, driven by solid uptake across geographies. And with that, I will hand over the word to Doug.

pairs.en: Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, Head of North America Operations
pairs.zh:
Doug Langa——执行副总裁，北美运营主管  
Doug Langa--Executive Vice President, Head of North America Operations

pairs.en: Thank you, Camilla. Please turn to the next slide. In the U.S., sales growth of our GLP-1 diabetes treatments are driven by a 50% expansion of the market in 2023 versus 2022. In the fourth quarter of 2023, the prescription volume growth of the GLP-1 class was more than 30% compared to the fourth quarter of 2022.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Camilla。请翻到下一页幻灯片。在美国，我们的GLP-1糖尿病治疗药物的销售增长得益于2023年市场相比2022年扩张了50%。2023年第四季度，GLP-1类药物的处方量相比2022年第四季度增长超过30%。

Thank you, Camilla. Please turn to the next slide. In the U.S., sales growth of our GLP-1 diabetes treatments are driven by a 50% expansion of the market in 2023 versus 2022. In the fourth quarter of 2023, the prescription volume growth of the GLP-1 class was more than 30% compared to the fourth quarter of 2022.

pairs.en: Measured on total prescriptions, Novo Nordisk continues to be the market leader with around 54% market share. Please turn to the next slide. Obesity care sales grew by 154%, driven by both operating units. The volume growth of the global branded obesity market more than doubled with a volume growth of 116%.
pairs.zh:
按总处方量计算，Novo Nordisk继续成为市场领导者，拥有约54%的市场份额。请翻到下一张幻灯片。在两个业务单元的推动下，肥胖护理销售额增长了154%。全球品牌肥胖市场的销量增长超过一倍，销量增长达到116%。

Measured on total prescriptions, Novo Nordisk continues to be the market leader with around 54% market share. Please turn to the next slide. Obesity care sales grew by 154%, driven by both operating units. The volume growth of the global branded obesity market more than doubled with a volume growth of 116%.

pairs.en: In international operations, obesity care sales are driven by a strong Saxenda performance and Wegovy launches in seven international operation countries. In the U.S., sales of Wegovy grew by 393%, reflecting the commercial relaunch in January of 2023. To safeguard continuity of care, we reduced the release of lower-dose strengths back in May of 2023, which continued throughout the remainder of last year. I am very pleased to state that we are now enabling more new U.S.
pairs.zh:
在国际业务中，肥胖症护理产品的销售得益于Saxenda的强劲表现以及Wegovy在七个国际运营国家的推出。在美国，Wegovy的销售额增长了393%，反映了2023年1月的商业重新上市。为确保护理的连续性，我们在2023年5月减少了低剂量强度的释放，这一做法持续至去年剩余时间。我很高兴地表示，我们现在正在让更多新的美国患者得以开始治疗。

In international operations, obesity care sales are driven by a strong Saxenda performance and Wegovy launches in seven international operation countries. In the U.S., sales of Wegovy grew by 393%, reflecting the commercial relaunch in January of 2023. To safeguard continuity of care, we reduced the release of lower-dose strengths back in May of 2023, which continued throughout the remainder of last year. I am very pleased to state that we are now enabling more new U.S.

pairs.en: patients to initiate treatment by more than doubling the amount of the lower-dose strengths of Wegovy compared to the previous months. We will gradually be increasing the overall supply throughout the remainder of 2024. Please go to the next slide. Our rare disease sales decreased by 15%.
pairs.zh:
患者启动治疗时，Wegovy低剂量强度的数量比前几个月增加了一倍以上。我们将在2024年剩余时间逐步增加总体供应。请翻到下一张幻灯片。我们的罕见病销售额下降了15%。

原文：patients to initiate treatment by more than doubling the amount of the lower-dose strengths of Wegovy compared to the previous months. We will gradually be increasing the overall supply throughout the remainder of 2024. Please go to the next slide. Our rare disease sales decreased by 15%.

pairs.en: The sales decrease was driven by a 1% sales decline in North America operations and 24% sales decline in international operations. Sales of rare blood disorders increased by 3%, driven by the launch products in hemophilia A and B, and partially countered by NovoSeven. Sales of our rare endocrine disorder products decreased by 47%, reflecting a reduction in manufacturing output. Now, Martin, over to you for an update on R&D.
pairs.zh:
销售额下降的主要原因是北美业务销售额下降1%，国际业务销售额下降24%。罕见血液疾病产品销售额增长3%，得益于血友病A和血友病B新产品的上市，但部分被NovoSeven的销售额下滑所抵消。罕见内分泌疾病产品销售额下降47%，反映了生产产量的减少。现在，Martin，请你来更新一下研发进展。

原文：The sales decrease was driven by a 1% sales decline in North America operations and 24% sales decline in international operations. Sales of rare blood disorders increased by 3%, driven by the launch products in hemophilia A and B, and partially countered by NovoSeven. Sales of our rare endocrine disorder products decreased by 47%, reflecting a reduction in manufacturing output. Now, Martin, over to you for an update on R&D.

pairs.en: Martin Lange--Executive Vice President, Head of Development
pairs.zh:
Martin Lange——执行副总裁，开发主管  
Martin Lange--Executive Vice President, Head of Development

pairs.en: Thank you, Doug. Please turn to the next slide. First, I'm very pleased to share the exciting headline results from the COMBINE 3 trial with once-weekly IcoSema. COMBINE 3 free was a 52-week, open-label treat-to-target phase 3 trial comparing once-weekly IcoSema with once-daily insulin glargine U100 together with up to four daily injections of insulin aspart.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Doug。请翻到下一页。首先，我非常高兴地分享每周一次IcoSema的COMBINE 3试验的激动人心的主要结果。COMBINE 3 free是一项为期52周、开放标签、达标治疗的三期试验，比较了每周一次的IcoSema与每日一次的甘精胰岛素U100联合每日最多四次的门冬胰岛素注射。

Thank you, Doug. Please turn to the next slide. First, I'm very pleased to share the exciting headline results from the COMBINE 3 trial with once-weekly IcoSema. COMBINE 3 free was a 52-week, open-label treat-to-target phase 3 trial comparing once-weekly IcoSema with once-daily insulin glargine U100 together with up to four daily injections of insulin aspart.

pairs.en: This is also called basal-bolus insulin treatment. The objective of COMBINE 3 was to assist the efficacy and safety of once-weekly IcoSema in people with type 2 diabetes poorly controlled on daily basal insulin. The trial achieved its primary endpoint of demonstrating noninferiority in reducing A1c at week 52 with once-weekly IcoSema compared to insulin glargine U100 together with insulin aspart. From an overall A1c baseline of 8.3%, once-weekly IcoSema achieved an estimated reduction in HbA1c of 1.47 percentage points compared with 1.40 percentage points for insulin glargine together with the insulin aspart.
pairs.zh:
这也被称为基础-餐时胰岛素治疗。COMBINE 3的目标是评估每周一次IcoSema对每日基础胰岛素控制不佳的2型糖尿病患者的疗效和安全性。该试验达到了主要终点，即在第52周时，每周一次IcoSema在降低A1c方面非劣效于甘精胰岛素U100联合门冬胰岛素。在总体A1c基线为8.3%的情况下，每周一次IcoSema使HbA1c估计降低1.47个百分点，而甘精胰岛素联合门冬胰岛素降低1.40个百分点。

This is also called basal-bolus insulin treatment. The objective of COMBINE 3 was to assist the efficacy and safety of once-weekly IcoSema in people with type 2 diabetes poorly controlled on daily basal insulin. The trial achieved its primary endpoint of demonstrating noninferiority in reducing A1c at week 52 with once-weekly IcoSema compared to insulin glargine U100 together with insulin aspart. From an overall A1c baseline of 8.3%, once-weekly IcoSema achieved an estimated reduction in HbA1c of 1.47 percentage points compared with 1.40 percentage points for insulin glargine together with the insulin aspart.

pairs.en: People in the trial had a baseline body weight of 85.8 kilograms. Treatment with IcoSema achieved a superior reduction in body weight with a weight loss of 3.6 kilograms with IcoSema compared with a 3.2 kilogram weight gain with the basal -- with the insulin basal-bolus treatment. The estimated treatment difference was 6.7 kilograms. IcoSema also showed superiority over insulin glargine U100 together with the insulin aspart in terms of severe or clinically significant hypoglycemic events with only 0.26 events per patient year of exposure compared to 2.18 events per patient year of exposure in the basal-bolus treatment arm.
pairs.zh:
试验参与者的基线体重为85.8公斤。使用IcoSema治疗实现了更优的体重减轻，体重减少了3.6公斤，而基础-餐时胰岛素治疗组的体重增加了3.2公斤。估计的治疗差异为6.7公斤。在严重或具有临床意义的低血糖事件方面，IcoSema也显示出优于甘精胰岛素U100联合门冬胰岛素的效果，IcoSema组每患者年暴露事件仅为0.26次，而基础-餐时治疗组为2.18次。

People in the trial had a baseline body weight of 85.8 kilograms. Treatment with IcoSema achieved a superior reduction in body weight with a weight loss of 3.6 kilograms with IcoSema compared with a 3.2 kilogram weight gain with the basal -- with the insulin basal-bolus treatment. The estimated treatment difference was 6.7 kilograms. IcoSema also showed superiority over insulin glargine U100 together with the insulin aspart in terms of severe or clinically significant hypoglycemic events with only 0.26 events per patient year of exposure compared to 2.18 events per patient year of exposure in the basal-bolus treatment arm.

pairs.en: Overall, IcoSema appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. These phase 3 results for once-weekly IcoSema are very promising. For people with poorly controlled type 2 diabetes on basal insulin, IcoSema has the potential to streamline insulin intensification by addressing the main patient barriers. IcoSema sets a new standard for once-weekly treatment by reducing the annual injections from around 1,450 to 52 injections.
pairs.zh:
总体而言，IcoSema 显示出安全且耐受性良好的特征。这些针对每周一次 IcoSema 的三期结果非常有前景。对于使用基础胰岛素但血糖控制不佳的2型糖尿病患者，IcoSema 有潜力通过解决患者的主要障碍来简化胰岛素强化治疗。IcoSema 将每年注射次数从约1450次减少到52次，为每周一次治疗设定了新标准。

Overall, IcoSema appear to have a safe and well-tolerated profile. These phase 3 results for once-weekly IcoSema are very promising. For people with poorly controlled type 2 diabetes on basal insulin, IcoSema has the potential to streamline insulin intensification by addressing the main patient barriers. IcoSema sets a new standard for once-weekly treatment by reducing the annual injections from around 1,450 to 52 injections.

pairs.en: This substantial reduction in patient burden is provided together with a strong glycemic control, proper weight management, and, importantly, a factor of 10 times lower rates of hypoglycemia as compared to the current gold standard of insulin basal-bolus treatment. Please turn to the next slide. Turning to the upcoming R&D milestones. There are many exciting trial results in 2024.
pairs.zh:
这种患者负担的大幅减轻伴随着强大的血糖控制、适当的体重管理，以及重要的是，与当前金标准的胰岛素基础-餐时治疗（insulin basal-bolus treatment）相比，低血糖发生率降低了10倍。请翻到下一张幻灯片。接下来看即将到来的研发里程碑。2024年有许多令人兴奋的试验结果。

This substantial reduction in patient burden is provided together with a strong glycemic control, proper weight management, and, importantly, a factor of 10 times lower rates of hypoglycemia as compared to the current gold standard of insulin basal-bolus treatment. Please turn to the next slide. Turning to the upcoming R&D milestones. There are many exciting trial results in 2024.

pairs.en: However, before I get to that, I would like to highlight a few of the milestones from the fourth quarter of 2023. Within obesity, we have successfully completed two phase 3 studies with semaglutide 2.4 milligram, addressing obesity-related comorbidities, as well as the phase 1 trial for oral amycretin. First, the STEP 9 trial was a phase 3 knee osteoarthritis trial that investigated the effects of semaglutide 2.4 milligrams once-weekly on the co-primary endpoints of body weight and the Western Ontario and McMaster Universities Osteoarthritis Index, abbreviated WOMAC. This is a self-administered measurement used in assessing pain and functionality.
pairs.zh:
不过，在谈到这一点之前，我想重点介绍一下2023年第四季度取得的一些里程碑式的进展。在肥胖领域，我们已成功完成两项使用semaglutide 2.4毫克的三期研究，针对肥胖相关合并症，以及口服amycretin的一期试验。首先，STEP 9试验是一项关于膝骨关节炎的三期研究，探讨了每周一次semaglutide 2.4毫克对体重和西安大略与麦克马斯特大学骨关节炎指数（简称WOMAC）的双重主要终点的影响。WOMAC是一种用于评估疼痛和功能的自评量表。

However, before I get to that, I would like to highlight a few of the milestones from the fourth quarter of 2023. Within obesity, we have successfully completed two phase 3 studies with semaglutide 2.4 milligram, addressing obesity-related comorbidities, as well as the phase 1 trial for oral amycretin. First, the STEP 9 trial was a phase 3 knee osteoarthritis trial that investigated the effects of semaglutide 2.4 milligrams once-weekly on the co-primary endpoints of body weight and the Western Ontario and McMaster Universities Osteoarthritis Index, abbreviated WOMAC. This is a self-administered measurement used in assessing pain and functionality.

pairs.en: In the trial, 407 people with obesity and mild to moderate knee osteoarthritis were enrolled. The study achieved its co-primary endpoint by demonstrating a superior reduction in both the WOMAC pain score, as well as in-body weight with semaglutide 2.4 milligram compared to placebo. The estimated reduction in mean WOMAC pain score from baseline to week 68 was 41.7 with semaglutide 2.4 milligram and 27.5 with placebo. The estimated treatment difference was 14.1, which was not only statistically significant but also considered clinically very relevant.
pairs.zh:
在试验中，共纳入407名患有肥胖且伴有轻至中度膝骨关节炎的患者。研究达到了复合主要终点，证明与安慰剂相比，semaglutide 2.4毫克在降低WOMAC疼痛评分和体重方面均表现出更优的效果。从基线至第68周，semaglutide 2.4毫克组的平均WOMAC疼痛评分估计降低41.7，而安慰剂组降低27.5。估计治疗差异为14.1，这不仅具有统计学显著性，且被认为在临床上非常相关。

In the trial, 407 people with obesity and mild to moderate knee osteoarthritis were enrolled. The study achieved its co-primary endpoint by demonstrating a superior reduction in both the WOMAC pain score, as well as in-body weight with semaglutide 2.4 milligram compared to placebo. The estimated reduction in mean WOMAC pain score from baseline to week 68 was 41.7 with semaglutide 2.4 milligram and 27.5 with placebo. The estimated treatment difference was 14.1, which was not only statistically significant but also considered clinically very relevant.

pairs.en: The trial results will serve as a foundation for potential outcomes trials with future obesity assets. In addition, we have successfully completed the STEP HFpEF diabetes trial. The STEP HFpEF diabetes trial investigated the impact of semaglutide treatment on functionality and symptoms in patients with obesity, type 2 diabetes, and established heart failure. In total, 660 people were enrolled in the study.
pairs.zh:
这些试验结果将为未来肥胖药物的潜在疗效试验奠定基础。此外，我们已成功完成了STEP HFpEF糖尿病试验。该试验研究了semaglutide治疗对患有肥胖、2型糖尿病及确诊心力衰竭患者的功能及症状的影响。研究共纳入660人。

The trial results will serve as a foundation for potential outcomes trials with future obesity assets. In addition, we have successfully completed the STEP HFpEF diabetes trial. The STEP HFpEF diabetes trial investigated the impact of semaglutide treatment on functionality and symptoms in patients with obesity, type 2 diabetes, and established heart failure. In total, 660 people were enrolled in the study.

pairs.en: The co-primary endpoints were the average change of baseline in the Kansas City clinical summary score questionnaire and body weight. In the trials, semaglutide showed a 13.7 points improvement versus 6.4 in the placebo arm at 52 weeks. The mean change was 7.3 points in favor of semaglutide, which is considered clinically very relevant and very solid results with chronic heart failure. A superior reduction in body weight was also observed for semaglutide 2.4 milligrams versus placebo.
pairs.zh:
共同主要终点是堪萨斯城临床总结评分问卷和体重的基线平均变化。在试验中，semaglutide在第52周时改善13.7分，而安慰剂组为6.4分。平均变化为7.3分，semaglutide组更优，这被认为在慢性心力衰竭方面具有非常显著的临床意义和非常可靠的结果。此外，与安慰剂相比，semaglutide 2.4毫克还观察到更优的体重减轻。

The co-primary endpoints were the average change of baseline in the Kansas City clinical summary score questionnaire and body weight. In the trials, semaglutide showed a 13.7 points improvement versus 6.4 in the placebo arm at 52 weeks. The mean change was 7.3 points in favor of semaglutide, which is considered clinically very relevant and very solid results with chronic heart failure. A superior reduction in body weight was also observed for semaglutide 2.4 milligrams versus placebo.

pairs.en: We've submitted the results from the STEP HFpEF obesity trial, as well as the type 2 diabetes trial for regulatory review in the U.S. and Europe during the course of January of '24. This marks another milestone in our ongoing efforts to address the unmet medical needs in patients with overweight obesity and established cardiovascular disease. The last highlight for the fourth quarter of 2023 is the successful completion of oral amycretin phase 1.
pairs.zh:
我们已经提交了STEP HFpEF肥胖试验以及2型糖尿病试验的结果，以便在'24年1月期间在美国和欧洲进行监管审评。这标志着我们在持续努力解决超重肥胖及已确诊心血管疾病患者未满足医疗需求方面取得的又一个里程碑。2023年第四季度的最后一个亮点是口服amycretin 1期试验的成功完成。

We've submitted the results from the STEP HFpEF obesity trial, as well as the type 2 diabetes trial for regulatory review in the U.S. and Europe during the course of January of '24. This marks another milestone in our ongoing efforts to address the unmet medical needs in patients with overweight obesity and established cardiovascular disease. The last highlight for the fourth quarter of 2023 is the successful completion of oral amycretin phase 1.

pairs.en: This trial appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile for amycretin. We have decided in September of 2023 to also initiate a phase 1 trial with one-weekly subcutaneous amycretin. And further, we expect to advance amycretin into further clinical development. Moving forward to 2024, within diabetes care, we expect a decision on approval of insulin icodec in Europe, Japan, China, as well as the U.S.
pairs.zh:
这项试验显示amycretin具有良好的安全性和耐受性。我们已于2023年9月决定启动每周一次皮下注射amycretin的1期试验。此外，我们计划将amycretin推进至进一步的临床开发。展望2024年，在糖尿病护理领域，我们预计insulin icodec将在欧洲、日本、中国以及美国获得批准决定。

This trial appeared to have a safe and well-tolerated profile for amycretin. We have decided in September of 2023 to also initiate a phase 1 trial with one-weekly subcutaneous amycretin. And further, we expect to advance amycretin into further clinical development. Moving forward to 2024, within diabetes care, we expect a decision on approval of insulin icodec in Europe, Japan, China, as well as the U.S.

pairs.en: during the second half of 2024. We are also anticipating the exciting results of COMBINE 1 and COMBINE 2 from the IcoSema development program during the initial half of 2024. Of note, we are expecting the phase 1 results of the once-weekly GLP-1/GIP in the first half of '24, and we have further initiated a phase 1 trial with once-monthly GLP-1/GIP during the course of January of '24. We continue to build evidence for semaglutide molecule within diabetes as well.
pairs.zh:
在2024年下半年。我们还期待在2024年上半年从IcoSema开发项目中获得COMBINE 1和COMBINE 2的令人振奋的结果。值得注意的是，我们预计将在2024年上半年获得每周一次GLP-1/GIP的1期结果，并且在2024年1月期间进一步启动了一项每月一次GLP-1/GIP的1期试验。我们也在持续为semaglutide分子在糖尿病领域的应用积累证据。

during the second half of 2024. We are also anticipating the exciting results of COMBINE 1 and COMBINE 2 from the IcoSema development program during the initial half of 2024. Of note, we are expecting the phase 1 results of the once-weekly GLP-1/GIP in the first half of '24, and we have further initiated a phase 1 trial with once-monthly GLP-1/GIP during the course of January of '24. We continue to build evidence for semaglutide molecule within diabetes as well.

pairs.en: For subcutaneous semaglutide 1.0 milligram, we anticipate the readout of FLOW for people with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease in the first half of this year. This will be followed by the functional outcomes trial, STRIDE, for people with type 2 diabetes and peripheral artery disease in the second half of 2024. As far as semaglutide, the cardiovascular outcomes study, SOUL, is expected to be completed in the second half of 2024. This is getting semaglutide in people with diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
pairs.zh:
对于皮下注射1.0毫克的semaglutide，我们预计针对2型糖尿病合并慢性肾病患者的FLOW研究将在今年上半年公布结果。随后，针对2型糖尿病合并外周动脉疾病的功能结局试验STRIDE将于2024年下半年开展。至于semaglutide的心血管结局研究SOUL，预计将在2024年下半年完成，该研究针对的是糖尿病合并心血管疾病患者。

For subcutaneous semaglutide 1.0 milligram, we anticipate the readout of FLOW for people with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease in the first half of this year. This will be followed by the functional outcomes trial, STRIDE, for people with type 2 diabetes and peripheral artery disease in the second half of 2024. As far as semaglutide, the cardiovascular outcomes study, SOUL, is expected to be completed in the second half of 2024. This is getting semaglutide in people with diabetes and cardiovascular disease.

pairs.en: In the obesity area, we expect an FDA decision on the approval of the SELECT data submission in the first half of '24. Furthermore, we look forward to the first phase 3 readout for CagriSema toward the turn of the year. And as a last highlight, we are very excited about the upcoming readout of Mim8 phase 3 in the first half of 2028. Mim8 is a novel, next-generation factor VIII mimetic antibody with potential for improved patient outcomes and reduced burden of treatment in people with hemophilia A.
pairs.zh:
在肥胖领域，我们预计FDA将于'24上半年对SELECT数据提交的批准做出决定。此外，我们期待CagriSema在年底左右公布首个3期临床数据。最后一项亮点是，我们对Mim8在2028年上半年即将公布的3期数据感到非常兴奋。Mim8是一种新型的下一代因子VIII模拟抗体，有望改善血友病A患者的预后并减轻治疗负担。

In the obesity area, we expect an FDA decision on the approval of the SELECT data submission in the first half of '24. Furthermore, we look forward to the first phase 3 readout for CagriSema toward the turn of the year. And as a last highlight, we are very excited about the upcoming readout of Mim8 phase 3 in the first half of 2028. Mim8 is a novel, next-generation factor VIII mimetic antibody with potential for improved patient outcomes and reduced burden of treatment in people with hemophilia A.

pairs.en: With that, over to you, Karsten.
pairs.zh:
那么，接下来交给你了，Karsten。

With that, over to you, Karsten.

pairs.en: Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Karsten Munk Knudsen——执行副总裁、首席财务官

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In 2023, our sales grew by 31% in Danish kroner and 36% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. The gross margin increased to 84.6% compared to 83.9% in 2022, driven by a positive product mix following increased sales of injectable GLP-1-based treatments.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Martin。请翻到下一张幻灯片。2023年，我们的销售额以丹麦克朗计增长了31%，按固定汇率计算增长了36%，这得益于两个业务部门的推动。毛利率从2022年的83.9%提升至84.6%，这是由于注射用GLP-1类治疗药物销量增加带来了积极的产品组合。

Thank you, Martin. Please turn to the next slide. In 2023, our sales grew by 31% in Danish kroner and 36% at constant exchange rates, driven by both operating units. The gross margin increased to 84.6% compared to 83.9% in 2022, driven by a positive product mix following increased sales of injectable GLP-1-based treatments.

pairs.en: Costs related to ongoing capacity expansions and negative currency impact and lower realized prices mainly in the U.S. and region China partially offset these effects. Sales and distribution costs increased by 23% in Danish kroner and by 26% at constant exchange rates. The increase is driven by both operating units.
pairs.zh:
与持续产能扩张相关的成本、负面货币影响以及主要在美国和中国地区实现的价格下降部分抵消了这些影响。销售和分销成本以Danish kroner计算增长了23%，以固定汇率计算增长了26%。这一增长是由两个运营单位共同推动的。

Costs related to ongoing capacity expansions and negative currency impact and lower realized prices mainly in the U.S. and region China partially offset these effects. Sales and distribution costs increased by 23% in Danish kroner and by 26% at constant exchange rates. The increase is driven by both operating units.

pairs.en: In North America operations, cost increase is driven by the relaunch of Wegovy and promotional activities for Ozempic. While in international operations, cost increase is driven by promotional activities for Rybelsus, as well as obesity care market development activities. Furthermore, the increase in sales and distribution costs are impacted by adjustment to legal provisions. Research and development costs increased by 35% measured in Danish kroner and 37% at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
在北美业务中，成本增加是由Wegovy的重新上市和Ozempic的促销活动所推动。而在国际业务中，成本增加则源于Rybelsus的促销活动以及肥胖护理市场的开发活动。此外，销售和分销成本的增加也受到法律条款调整的影响。研发成本按丹麦克朗计算增长了35%，按固定汇率计算增长了37%。

In North America operations, cost increase is driven by the relaunch of Wegovy and promotional activities for Ozempic. While in international operations, cost increase is driven by promotional activities for Rybelsus, as well as obesity care market development activities. Furthermore, the increase in sales and distribution costs are impacted by adjustment to legal provisions. Research and development costs increased by 35% measured in Danish kroner and 37% at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: The increase reflects our strategic objective to expand the pipeline across therapy areas. Specifically, we continue to increase late-stage clinical trial and early research activities. The acquisition of Forma Therapeutics in 2022 and Inversago Pharma also increased R&D spending. Administration costs increased by 9% measured in Danish kroner and by 11% at constant exchange rates.
pairs.zh:
这一增长反映了我们扩大治疗领域产品线的战略目标。具体而言，我们持续增加后期临床试验和早期研究活动。2022年收购Forma Therapeutics和Inversago Pharma也增加了研发支出。以丹麦克朗计算，行政成本增加了9%，按固定汇率计算则增加了11%。

原文：The increase reflects our strategic objective to expand the pipeline across therapy areas. Specifically, we continue to increase late-stage clinical trial and early research activities. The acquisition of Forma Therapeutics in 2022 and Inversago Pharma also increased R&D spending. Administration costs increased by 9% measured in Danish kroner and by 11% at constant exchange rates.

pairs.en: Operating profit increased by 37% measured in Danish kroner and by 44% at constant exchange rates, reflecting the sales growth. Net financial items showed a gain of 2.1 billion Danish kroner compared to a net loss of around 5.7 billion kroner last year. The effective tax rate is 20.1% in 2023 compared to 19.6% in 2022. Consequently, net profit increased by 51%, and diluted earnings per share increased by 52% to 18.62 Danish kroner.
pairs.zh:
营业利润以丹麦克朗计增长了37%，按固定汇率计算增长了44%，反映了销售增长。净财务项目收益为21亿丹麦克朗，而去年净亏损约57亿丹麦克朗。2023年实际税率为20.1%，2022年为19.6%。因此，净利润增长了51%，稀释每股收益增长52%至18.62丹麦克朗。

Operating profit increased by 37% measured in Danish kroner and by 44% at constant exchange rates, reflecting the sales growth. Net financial items showed a gain of 2.1 billion Danish kroner compared to a net loss of around 5.7 billion kroner last year. The effective tax rate is 20.1% in 2023 compared to 19.6% in 2022. Consequently, net profit increased by 51%, and diluted earnings per share increased by 52% to 18.62 Danish kroner.

pairs.en: Free cash flow realized in 2023 was 68.3 billion Danish kroner compared with 57.4 billion in 2022. This is in line with the strategic aspiration to deliver attractive capital allocation to shareholders. The cash conversion in 2023 was positively impacted by timing of payment of rebates in the U.S. and provisions related to the revised three 340B distribution policy also in the U.S.
pairs.zh:
2023年实现的自由现金流为683亿丹麦克朗，而2022年为574亿丹麦克朗。这与向股东提供有吸引力的资本配置的战略目标相符。2023年的现金转化率受到美国回扣支付时间以及美国修订后的三项340B分销政策相关拨备的积极影响。

Free cash flow realized in 2023 was 68.3 billion Danish kroner compared with 57.4 billion in 2022. This is in line with the strategic aspiration to deliver attractive capital allocation to shareholders. The cash conversion in 2023 was positively impacted by timing of payment of rebates in the U.S. and provisions related to the revised three 340B distribution policy also in the U.S.

pairs.en: Capital expenditure for property, plant, and equipment was 25.8 billion Danish kroner compared with 12.1 billion in 2022. This primarily reflects investments in additional capacity for active pharmaceutical ingredient production and for finished capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products. Please go to the next slide. In 2024, we expect to increase our capital expenditure to around 45 billion Danish kroner.
pairs.zh:
不动产、厂房和设备的资本支出为25.8 billion丹麦克朗，而2022年为12.1 billion。这主要反映了对原料药生产额外产能以及当前和未来注射剂和口服制剂成品产能的投资。请进入下一张幻灯片。2024年，我们预计将资本支出增加到约45 billion丹麦克朗。

Capital expenditure for property, plant, and equipment was 25.8 billion Danish kroner compared with 12.1 billion in 2022. This primarily reflects investments in additional capacity for active pharmaceutical ingredient production and for finished capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products. Please go to the next slide. In 2024, we expect to increase our capital expenditure to around 45 billion Danish kroner.

pairs.en: The significant step-up compared to 2023 reflects the expansion of our supply chain. This includes the previously communicated expansions of manufacturing facilities in Kalundborg and Hillerod located in Denmark and Chartres based in France. The increase in capital expenditure in 2024 mainly relates to investments in additional capacity for active pharmaceutical ingredient production and for finished capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products across our strategic therapy areas. In the coming years, the capital expenditure to sales ratio is still expected to be low double digits.
pairs.zh:
与2023年相比的显著增长反映了我们供应链的扩张。这包括之前提及的位于丹麦Kalundborg和Hillerod以及法国Chartres的制造设施扩建。2024年资本支出的增加主要涉及对活性药物成分生产额外产能的投资，以及在我们战略治疗领域当前和未来注射及口服产品的成品产能投资。未来几年，资本支出与销售额的比率预计仍将保持在较低的两位数水平。

The significant step-up compared to 2023 reflects the expansion of our supply chain. This includes the previously communicated expansions of manufacturing facilities in Kalundborg and Hillerod located in Denmark and Chartres based in France. The increase in capital expenditure in 2024 mainly relates to investments in additional capacity for active pharmaceutical ingredient production and for finished capacity for both current and future injectable and oral products across our strategic therapy areas. In the coming years, the capital expenditure to sales ratio is still expected to be low double digits.

pairs.en: Next slide, please. In line with our strategic aspiration to deliver attractive capital allocation to shareholders, we have returned more than 61.7 billion Danish kroner to shareholders via share buybacks and dividends during 2023. At the end of general meeting on March the 21st of 2024, the board of directors will propose a final dividend of 6.40 Danish kroner for a total 2023 dividend of 9.40 Danish kroner, including the interim dividend paid in August of 2023. This is over a 50% increase compared to 2022, making it the 28th consecutive year with increasing dividend per share.

pairs.en: This is based on several assumptions as described in the company announcements. The guidance reflects expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and international operations. The sales growth is expected to be mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatment for obesity and diabetes care. With the expectations of continued volume growth and capacity limitations, the outlook also reflects expected continued periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies.
pairs.zh:
这是基于公司公告中描述的若干假设。该指引反映了对北美业务和国际业务销售增长的预期。销售增长预计主要受基于GLP-1的肥胖症和糖尿病治疗药物销量增长的推动。考虑到销量持续增长和产能限制的预期，展望还反映出预期中多个产品和地区将出现持续的供应限制及相关药品短缺通知。

This is based on several assumptions as described in the company announcements. The guidance reflects expectations for sales growth in both North America operations and international operations. The sales growth is expected to be mainly driven by volume growth of GLP-1-based treatment for obesity and diabetes care. With the expectations of continued volume growth and capacity limitations, the outlook also reflects expected continued periodic supply constraints and related drug shortage notifications across a number of products and geographies.

pairs.en: We expect that operating profit will grow between 21% and 29% at constant exchange rates. This primarily reflects the sales growth outlook and continued investments in future and current growth drivers within research, development, and commercial. Our reported sales are expected to be 1 percentage point lower at constant exchange rates, and operating profit is expected to be 2 percentage points lower than at constant exchange rates. For 2024, we expect net financial items to amount to a gain of around 1.3 billion Danish kroner.
pairs.zh:
我们预计，按固定汇率计算，营业利润将增长21%至29%。这主要反映了销售增长前景以及持续投资于研发和商业领域的未来及当前增长驱动力。按固定汇率计算，我们报告的销售额预计将低1个百分点，营业利润预计将比按固定汇率计算低2个百分点。对于2024年，我们预计净金融项目将带来约13亿丹麦克朗的收益。

We expect that operating profit will grow between 21% and 29% at constant exchange rates. This primarily reflects the sales growth outlook and continued investments in future and current growth drivers within research, development, and commercial. Our reported sales are expected to be 1 percentage point lower at constant exchange rates, and operating profit is expected to be 2 percentage points lower than at constant exchange rates. For 2024, we expect net financial items to amount to a gain of around 1.3 billion Danish kroner.

pairs.en: Thank you for the questions. I have two for Martin. The first is on the GLP-1/GIP dual agonist. As it relates to the clinical profile of a once-monthly injection, it seems to me that navigating GI toxicity during the titration phase with a drug that's on board for an entire month could be tricky.
pairs.zh:
感谢各位提问。我有两个问题想问Martin。第一个是关于GLP-1/GIP双激动剂。就每月一次注射的临床特征而言，在我看来，在使用一种在体内持续一个月的药物进行剂量滴定期时，处理胃肠道毒性可能会很棘手。

Thank you for the questions. I have two for Martin. The first is on the GLP-1/GIP dual agonist. As it relates to the clinical profile of a once-monthly injection, it seems to me that navigating GI toxicity during the titration phase with a drug that's on board for an entire month could be tricky.

pairs.en: Do you think that's a valid concern? And if so, might it undercut to some extent the convenience advantage? And then, my second question is on oral amycretin. Can you provide any insight into the efficacy you saw in the phase 1 trial? A reasonable ambition would be for weight loss that approaches that delivered by CagriSema but via the oral route. How close did amycretin get to that profile?
pairs.zh:
您认为这是一个合理的担忧吗？如果是的话，它是否会在一定程度上削弱便利性优势？接下来，我的第二个问题是关于口服amycretin。您能否谈谈在第一阶段试验中观察到的疗效？一个合理的期望是，通过口服途径实现接近CagriSema的减重效果。那么amycretin与此目标有多接近？

Do you think that's a valid concern? And if so, might it undercut to some extent the convenience advantage? And then, my second question is on oral amycretin. Can you provide any insight into the efficacy you saw in the phase 1 trial? A reasonable ambition would be for weight loss that approaches that delivered by CagriSema but via the oral route. How close did amycretin get to that profile?

pairs.en: Yeah, so thank you. Thank you for those questions. First of all, on the once-monthly GLP-1/GIP, honestly speaking, we asked ourselves the same questions when we move from once-daily to once-weekly. And this is all in the focus of titration.
pairs.zh:
是的，谢谢。感谢您提出的这些问题。首先，关于每月一次的GLP-1/GIP，说实话，我们在从每日一次转向每周一次时也问过自己同样的问题。而这完全围绕着剂量滴定。

Yeah, so thank you. Thank you for those questions. First of all, on the once-monthly GLP-1/GIP, honestly speaking, we asked ourselves the same questions when we move from once-daily to once-weekly. And this is all in the focus of titration.

pairs.en: So, proper titration will mitigate most GI and tolerability side effects. And therefore, we're quite confident that we can manage a once-monthly in that setting. We actually didn't see an increase moving from once-daily to once-weekly, and we don't expect to see that moving from once-weekly to once-monthly. On the amycretin, we're not disclosing phase 1 data, but you should obviously read into the fact that we are stating that we are progressing further development, which also means that we believe amycretin to be properly differentiated to whatever else is out there.
pairs.zh:
因此，适当的剂量滴定将减轻大多数胃肠道和耐受性副作用。因此，我们非常有信心在每月一次给药方案下管理这些反应。实际上，从每日一次改为每周一次时，我们并未观察到副作用增加，并且我们预计从每周一次改为每月一次时也不会出现增加。关于amycretin，我们不会披露1期数据，但显而易见的是，我们已明确表示正在推进进一步开发，这也意味着我们相信amycretin与目前市面上的其他产品相比具有充分的差异化优势。

So, proper titration will mitigate most GI and tolerability side effects. And therefore, we're quite confident that we can manage a once-monthly in that setting. We actually didn't see an increase moving from once-daily to once-weekly, and we don't expect to see that moving from once-weekly to once-monthly. On the amycretin, we're not disclosing phase 1 data, but you should obviously read into the fact that we are stating that we are progressing further development, which also means that we believe amycretin to be properly differentiated to whatever else is out there.

pairs.en: 1 priority is scaling supply. I just want to try and marry that with the comments you provided for '24 and guidance. I mean, if I just annualize your exit run rate Q4 2023, you pretty much are at the bottom end of 2024 guidance. And I realize there's FX and there's rebating to consider, but I didn't want to push my luck and try and get a handle how significantly capacity will increase in 2024, especially in light of SELECT coming on the label this year and likely increasing demand further.
pairs.zh:
第一优先级是扩大供应。我只是想尝试将其与您为'24年提供的评论和指引结合起来。我的意思是，如果我把2023年第四季度的退出年化运行率计算一下，您基本上处于2024年指引的下限。我意识到需要考虑外汇和返点，但我不想冒险去试图了解2024年产能将增加多少，特别是考虑到SELECT今年上市并可能进一步增加需求。

1 priority is scaling supply. I just want to try and marry that with the comments you provided for '24 and guidance. I mean, if I just annualize your exit run rate Q4 2023, you pretty much are at the bottom end of 2024 guidance. And I realize there's FX and there's rebating to consider, but I didn't want to push my luck and try and get a handle how significantly capacity will increase in 2024, especially in light of SELECT coming on the label this year and likely increasing demand further.

pairs.en: And then, secondly, for Karsten, just a quickly on the revenue recognition from 340B pharmacy. I know you currently only partially revenue recognize, and that's what's baked into guidance, but I thought there was a chance that that could change in 2023, given that you had prevailed in litigation with HHS. So, is -- could there be any change in your stance in 340B in '24? And am I right that where you to fully revenue recognize that could actually have quite a meaningful uplift to Novo earnings, around 5%? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
其次，对于Karsten，我想快速问一下340B pharmacy的收入确认问题。我知道目前你们仅部分确认收入，这也已纳入指引，但我原以为在2023年情况可能有所变化，因为你们在与HHS的诉讼中胜诉了。那么，在2024年，你们对340B的立场是否会有任何改变？我理解得对吗？如果你们完全确认收入，实际上可能会对Novo的收益带来约5%的显著提升？谢谢。

And then, secondly, for Karsten, just a quickly on the revenue recognition from 340B pharmacy. So, is -- could there be any change in your stance in 340B in '24? And am I right that where you to fully revenue recognize that could actually have quite a meaningful uplift to Novo earnings, around 5%? Thank you.

Karsten Munk Knudsen--Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah, so, first, as to our 2024 guidance, the important point is that we are continuing the growth trajectory we showed already in 2023. And just to remind you, 36% sales growth adding to the tune of 5 million people on Novo Nordisk products over a 12-month period. So, we do believe that that's significant scaling and in round numbers. We're talking about that magnitude when you look at our scaling into next year.
pairs.zh:
是的，首先，关于我们的2024年指引，重要的一点是我们正延续2023年已展现的增长轨迹。提醒一下，36%的销售增长，相当于12个月内新增约500万人使用Novo Nordisk产品。因此，我们相信这是显著的规模扩张，且大致数字如此。当我们展望明年的规模时，谈论的就是这个量级。

Yeah, so, first, as to our 2024 guidance, the important point is that we are continuing the growth trajectory we showed already in 2023. And just to remind you, 36% sales growth adding to the tune of 5 million people on Novo Nordisk products over a 12-month period. So, we do believe that's significant scaling and in round numbers. We're talking about that magnitude when you look at our scaling into next year.

pairs.en: So, it's a similar type scaling we'll be doing in 2024. I don't like necessarily the logic between multiplying Q4 by four because we're in a chronic disease business, so all the ups and downs of currencies and inventories in one quarter makes it dangerous to annualize just based on three months. So -- but again, the growth platforms remain the same. It's Rybelsus, it's Ozempic, and it's Wegovy.
pairs.zh:
所以，我们在2024年将进行类似规模的扩展。我不太认同将第四季度数据乘以四来推算全年的逻辑，因为我们身处慢性病业务领域，单季度的汇率和库存波动使得仅凭三个月的数据进行年化处理存在风险。不过——重申一次，增长平台保持不变，即Rybelsus、Ozempic和Wegovy。

原文：So, it's a similar type scaling we'll be doing in 2024. I don't like necessarily the logic between multiplying Q4 by four because we're in a chronic disease business, so all the ups and downs of currencies and inventories in one quarter makes it dangerous to annualize just based on three months. So -- but again, the growth platforms remain the same. It's Rybelsus, it's Ozempic, and it's Wegovy.

pairs.en: And we're scaling those -- all of those three platforms, which is what gives us a the guidance that we provided today. And then, as to 340B, you're right. As we state, we're only partially recognizing 340B revenue. And that's linked to the accounting standards of in order to recognize revenue, it has to be what the accountants or the authors call highly probable.
pairs.zh:
我们正在扩大这三个平台——这正是我们今日提供指引的基础。至于340B，你说得对。正如我们所述，我们仅部分确认340B收入。这与会计准则相关：要确认收入，必须达到会计师或准则制定者所谓的“高度可能”标准。

And we're scaling those -- all of those three platforms, which is what gives us a the guidance that we provided today. And then, as to 340B, you're right. As we state, we're only partially recognizing 340B revenue. And that's linked to the accounting standards of in order to recognize revenue, it has to be what the accountants or the authors call highly probable.

pairs.en: So, that's the backdrop behind that. And, yes, we prevailed in our case back in January of '23. There are still two cases outstanding in different jurisdictions around the same question. So, that would be key informative points for us to decide on how to proceed forward vis-a-vis our accounting recognition in this space.
pairs.zh:
所以，这就是其背后的背景。是的，我们在2023年1月的案件中胜诉了。围绕同一问题，不同司法管辖区仍有待审理的两起案件。因此，这些将是我们决定如何推进该领域会计确认的关键信息点。

原文：
So, that's the backdrop behind that. And, yes, we prevailed in our case back in January of '23. There are still two cases outstanding in different jurisdictions around the same question. So, that would be key informative points for us to decide on how to proceed forward vis-a-vis our accounting recognition in this space.

pairs.en: So, thank you very much, Sachin. I'm not sure I'm being vague. We're just saying that we're not communicating phase 1 data. I think you will hear and see -- or you will see us progress should the data confirm it, both the subcutaneous but also potentially the oral.

pairs.en: The reason why we are pursuing both in phase 1 is obviously providing optionality. We see a big demand, and we need to provide flexibility and optionality. The reason why we are pursuing both in phase 1 is obviously providing optionality. We see a big demand, and we need to provide flexibility and optionality. pairs.en: And that goes for both the subcutaneous and the oral in the marketplace. And what we have seen so far for amycretin brings us confidence that amycretin in both oral and subcutaneous, when we see the data, has that potential.

And the real difference, what you saw in 2023 is actually that on GLP-1 and diabetes, the growth levels were similar, just north of 50%, both in IO and North America. So, the fundamental difference is the pace of Wegovy rollouts.

And the real difference, what you saw in 2023 is actually that on GLP-1 and diabetes, the growth levels were similar, just north of 50%, both in IO and North America. So, the fundamental difference is the pace of Wegovy rollouts.

pairs.en: And, of course, the North America are rolling ahead of IO, but it is important to note that we will be launching in additional IO markets in the volume cap way for Wegovy into 2024. But you should expect North America still to be rolling at a higher pace than IO.

And, of course, the North America are rolling ahead of IO, but it is important to note that we will be launching in additional IO markets in the volume cap way for Wegovy into 2024. But you should expect North America still to be rolling at a higher pace than IO.

Yeah. Thank you, Martin. On portfolio participation, I think you should see us as being committed to people living with diabetes and in need of insulin. When we look at Levemir, specifically in the U.S., we have a situation where we have, you know, Tresiba as well, we will be launching a weekly insulin.
pairs.zh:
是的。谢谢你，Martin。关于投资组合参与，我认为你应该看到我们致力于为患有糖尿病且需要胰岛素的人们服务。当我们看Levemir，特别是在美国，我们还有一个情况，你知道，我们还有Tresiba，我们将推出一款每周一次的胰岛素。

原文：Yeah. Thank you, Martin. On portfolio participation, I think you should see us as being committed to people living with diabetes and in need of insulin. When we look at Levemir, specifically in the U.S., we have a situation where we have, you know, Tresiba as well, we will be launching a weekly insulin.

pairs.en: And we also see a dynamics where we have lost a contract on Levemir. So, for us to stay committed to patients is also leading to us, then thinking carefully about what are the most, say, optimal ways of treating those patients with the most efficacious products. And on GLP-1, there's also the optimization in moving patients from daily treatment to weekly treatment, where you get higher efficacy and obviously an easier to produce presentation as you reduce the number of injections and presentations needed. So, we are going to be, say, having a social responsibility vis-a-vis the patients while still optimizing to a degree where it both benefits patients and our ability to scale.
pairs.zh:
我们还观察到，我们失去了Levemir的一份合同。因此，为了继续对患者负责，我们也在认真思考，如何用最有效的产品为患者提供最理想的治疗方案。在GLP-1方面，我们也在优化方案，将患者从每日治疗转向每周治疗，这样疗效更高，而且由于减少了注射次数和剂型需求，剂型也更易于生产。因此，我们将在承担社会责任的同时，持续优化方案，使其既有利于患者，也有助于我们扩大生产规模。

And we also see a dynamics where we have lost a contract on Levemir. So, for us to stay committed to patients is also leading to us, then thinking carefully about what are the most, say, optimal ways of treating those patients with the most efficacious products. And on GLP-1, there's also the optimization in moving patients from daily treatment to weekly treatment, where you get higher efficacy and obviously an easier to produce presentation as you reduce the number of injections and presentations needed. So, we are going to be, say, having a social responsibility vis-a-vis the patients while still optimizing to a degree where it both benefits patients and our ability to scale.

pairs.en: Yeah. Thank you very much. First of all, on the once-monthly, as you obviously know, this is phase 1 and this is one of a number of tracks that we are pursuing in this space. It's a technology that we cannot share at this point in time.
pairs.zh:

原文：Yeah. Thank you very much. First of all, on the once-monthly, as you obviously know, this is phase 1 and this is one of a number of tracks that we are pursuing in this space. It's a technology that we cannot share at this point in time.

pairs.en: But broadly speaking, we are confident and happy with our research progress in this space. And obviously, we will not take assets into phase one without a level of confidence in the broad applicability and success. On the WOMAC, the sort of broad applicability is that if you see a 35-point change from baseline, you are in the very clinically relevant space. And here, we saw a 41-point improvement.
pairs.zh:
但总的来说，我们对这一领域的研究进展感到自信和满意。显然，如果对广泛适用性和成功缺乏一定信心，我们不会将资产推进到第一阶段。在WOMAC上，所谓的广泛适用性是指，如果你看到相对于基线有35个点的变化，那就处于非常具有临床意义的区间。而在这里，我们看到了41个点的改善。

But broadly speaking, we are confident and happy with our research progress in this space. And obviously, we will not take assets into phase one without a level of confidence in the broad applicability and success. On the WOMAC, the sort of broad applicability is that if you see a 35-point change from baseline, you are in the very clinically relevant space. And here, we saw a 41-point improvement.

pairs.en: In terms of concomitant medication, this was allowed, but this is specifically why we have a control group in the study. You actually also saw improvement in the placebo arm. But the improvement seen with semaglutide was above and beyond that and in the space being statistically significant, as well as clinically relevant.
pairs.zh:
在合并用药方面，这是允许的，但这正是我们在研究中设置对照组的原因。实际上，安慰剂组也出现了改善。而semaglutide带来的改善更胜一筹，在统计学上具有显著性，同时也具有临床意义。

原文：
In terms of concomitant medication, this was allowed, but this is specifically why we have a control group in the study. You actually also saw improvement in the placebo arm. Hi, Mark. So, as to Wegovy and CMO filling, what I can say is that we are on track with what we previously communicated with the three CMO lines. pairs.en: And specifically, on the cardiovascular benefits of our pipeline products vis-a-vis semaglutide, what we, for example, know from CagriSema, and right now, we have to rely on biomarkers, is that CagriSema is obviously superior on body weight or has the potential to be superior on glycemic control, but also will be superior on, for example, blood pressure lowering, lipid lowering, and potentially all the very relevant cardiovascular biomarkers. All of that gives us a lot of confidence in that CagriSema will be associated with a quite profound benefit in the cardiovascular space. But obviously, we have to show that in phase 3. And as you know, we are currently running the REDEFINE 3 study to that effect.

pairs.en: So, this is what you should expect on. And as a normal distribution, expect something around the mid of the range. That's how we work on this. And then, it's important to note that being in a supply constrained environment, it's very important for us in order to manage our business in a sustainable way that we focus on our supply chain and ensure that it's resilient so we don't get into some of the bumps that we saw in the past with the stop-go type decision.
pairs.zh:
所以，这就是你应该预期的。按照正态分布，预期结果将在范围中值附近。这是我们处理问题的方式。此外，值得注意的是，在供应受限的环境下，为了以可持续的方式管理业务，我们必须专注于供应链，确保其具有韧性，这样我们就能避免过去那种因走走停停式决策而出现的波动。

Yeah, thank you, Daniel. And also, thank you from me for all participating today. A lot of focus on scaling capacities with some real, tangible backing of our scaling in the form of now more than doubling the start doses in the U.S., and we look to continuously expand our capacity and, equally important, the expansion of our pipeline and really doubling down on our strongholds in diabetes obesity, but also increasingly cardiovascular disease and rare blood disorders.

好的，谢谢Daniel。我也要感谢今天所有参与的人。希望大家都清楚，我们对过去一年的业绩非常满意，同时也对2024年能取得的成就充满期待，因为我们提出了颇具吸引力的业绩指引区间。我们重点聚焦于产能扩张，并且有了实实在在的支撑——美国市场的起始剂量现在已增长一倍以上。我们将持续扩大产能，同样重要的是，扩大产品管线，并真正加大对糖尿病和肥胖症领域的投入，同时心血管疾病和罕见血液疾病领域也将进一步加强。

Yeah, thank you, Daniel. And also, thank you from me for all participating today. I hope it's clear that we are very pleased with our performance in the past year and equally excited about what we can do in 2024 based on the attractive guidance range we have put forward. A lot of focus on scaling capacities with some real, tangible backing of our scaling in the form of now more than doubling the start doses in the U.S., and we look to continuously expand our capacity and, equally important, the expansion of our pipeline and really doubling down on our strongholds in diabetes obesity, but also increasingly cardiovascular disease and rare blood disorders.

pairs.en: So, we are excited about how the pipeline is shaping up. So, thank you all for your attention today, and we look forward to see you in the near future. Bye.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们对管线（pipeline）的进展情况感到兴奋。感谢大家今天的关注，期待在不久的将来与各位相见。再见。

So, we are excited about how the pipeline is shaping up. So, thank you all for your attention today, and we look forward to see you in the near future. Bye.
